arts.ttl: Oxford United vs Stoke City live - Team news from early kick-off at Kassam Stadium - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Tom Cannon is ready to make his Stoke City debut after showing Steven Schumacher his ability and hunger as he has joined in training. When he’s got opportunities in the training sessions whether we’ve played 11 v 11s or even small-sided games he’s shown the ability he’s got in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Million Manhoef chat as Stoke boss delivers 'ideal' verdict
arts.sum: “He’s got a number of goals last season, he’s started this season positively but I think there are loads of areas in his game he can improve on and he’s a really good kid. He wants to get better and I’ve got loads of time for people like that.”

arts.ttl: Laurent and Baker are no loss to Stoke and now we should see best of Burger
arts.sum: Laurent could be particularly frustrating because he has all the attributes but if you don’t work hard enough then the attributes don’t come out as regularly as they need to when you’re a senior player in a side that should be challenging at the right end of the Championship. It is a talent to be able to score from free-kicks and shoot from long range like Baker and you need someone in your team who has that capability but in terms of functioning possession play he wasn’t involved enough.

arts.ttl: Mark Harris shortlisted for goal of the month – watch them all here
arts.sum: SKY Bet Championship player of the month Mark Harris is now in the running for the division’s goal of the month.

arts.ttl: Des Buckingham ready for Potters reunion tomorrow afternoon
arts.sum: DES Buckingham is ready for a reunion with a team where he knows just how impressive things are behind the scenes.

arts.ttl: U’s boss praises Mark Harris and wider team after striker bags player of month
arts.sum: DES Buckingham has praised Mark Harris for scooping the Sky Bet Championship player of the month award, but insists it is also a reflection of the team around the striker.

arts.ttl: Mark Harris named Championship player of the month
arts.sum: MARK Harris has been named the Sky Bet Championship player of the month for August.

arts.ttl: Every word from Steven Schumacher press conference as Stoke prepare for Oxford
arts.sum: Stoke are tasked with picking up where they left off before the international break, with five players coming into the match day squad either after injury or for the first time. It allowed us to get some good training work into the players, especially the new lads who joined us on deadline day.

arts.ttl: 'Stoke signing can make a big difference but he has the hardest role'
arts.sum: You don't need to give players too much of a rest but there's always that feeling as a manager that if you can just have three days away from the group with your family, you can maybe use that time for a little bit of a mental reset, but also to review that start of the season and the window. There is obviously some pressure that comes attached to playing as a striker and I suppose in a slightly different way, when I came into Derby, we had Matěj Vyrdra who I think at the time was training with the under-23s or he was very close to training with the under-23s.

arts.ttl: What Steven Schumacher told John Coates in Stoke City job interview as new striker raring to go
arts.sum: Tom Cannon is ready to make his Stoke City debut after showing Steven Schumacher his ability and hunger as he has joined in training. “When you get through to the end of August and the transfer window is closing it’s almost a bit of a relief because you know this is what you’re working with and this is what the coaching team now have to get our heads around and figure out the best way of how we’re going to play and go about things to get the results we need to get.
